title: senna punoensis
intro: Senna punoensis, also known as Peruvian senna, is a plant species in the Fabaceae family that is native to the Andean region. It is a shrub-like plant that is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and laxative effects. The health benefits of Senna punoensis include its ability to treat digestive issues, such as constipation and diarrhea, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues like bronchitis. Senna punoensis is traditionally prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its herbal preparations are often used in traditional medicine to promote digestive health and alleviate various health issues.
